zh.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: 英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾
zh.Bugthorpe, East Riding of Yorkshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Guest於1430年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Chung Guest30歲，母親Cathrine Davila31歲。她於1459年與William Nicholson在英國英格蘭越可爾斯卡波洛聖 瑪麗 煙雨 霍利 阿波斯特萊斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年在她的家鄉享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。

zh-hans.Bugthorpe, East Riding of Yorkshire, Eng: 英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Guest于1430年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲Chung Guest30岁，母亲Cathrine Davila31岁。她于1459年与William Nicholson在英国英格兰越可爾斯卡波洛聖 瑪麗 煙雨 霍利 阿波斯特萊斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年在她的家乡享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾金斯頓 武朋 赫爾。

nameMeanings.name: Guest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English g(h)est ‘guest, visitor’ (from Old Norse gestr, absorbing the cognate Old English giest).

variants.name: Guess
meanings: English (southern): probably a variant of Guest with loss of final -t.

variants.name: Gaston
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gasto, derived from gast ‘guest, foreigner’, earlier ‘foreign warrior’. This surname is also found in England and Ireland, where it is probably a Huguenot importation. Compare Guest .
English: in Gloucestershire, a variant of   Garston  , a topographic name or metonymic occupational name denoting someone who lived by or worked in a paddock.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Guest was born in 1430, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Chung Guest, was 30 and her mother, Cathrine Davila, was 31. She married William Nicholson in 1459, in Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1523, in her hometown, at the age of 93, and was buried in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Guest est née en 1430, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Chung Guest, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cathrine Davila, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Nicholson en 1459, à Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1523, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterrée à Kingston upon Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Guest 1430 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Chung Guest 30 und ihre Mutter Cathrine Davila 31. Sie hat 1459 in Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom William Nicholson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1523 im Alter von 93 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Guest è nata il nel 1430 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Chung Guest, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Cathrine Davila, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William Nicholson nel 1459, nel Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1523, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolta a Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Guestが1430年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Chung Guestは30歳，母Cathrine Davilaは31歳であった。1459年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスカーボロウサイント マリー ウィス ホーリー アポストレスでWilliam Nicholsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年に故郷で93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキングストン ウプオン ハルにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Guest(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Chung Guest(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cathrine Davila(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스카버루 세인트 메리 위스 홀이 아포스틀레스에서 William Nicholson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 그녀의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Guest nasceu em 1430, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Chung Guest, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cathrine Davila, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William Nicholson em 1459, em Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1523, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos, e foi sepultada em Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of Saint Mary, Lowgate, Kingston: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Guest родилась в 1430 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Chung Guest было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cathrine Davila, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Nicholson в 1459 г. в местности сеинт мэри вит холи апостлесь, скарбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1523 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 93 лет и была похоронена в местности кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Nicholson en 1459, en Saint Mary with Holy Apostles, Scarborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1523, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultada en Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
